coupon.source_phrase_block: This is an e-voucher . Discount code is e-mailed to the patron. The discount code provides access to purchase tickets at 50% off the regular price for the following: Spectacle Island May 16 - June 15: Thursdays through Sundays June 16 - Sep 1: every day Sep 4 - 21: Thursdays through Sundays Sep 26 - Oct 13: Fridays through Sundays Georges Island June 16 - Sep 1: every day Spectacle Island June 16 - Sep 1: every day Sep 4 - Oct 13: Thursdays through Sundays Ferries to Georges and Spectacle Islands are boarded at Long Wharf North in Downtown Boston. Ferries to Peddocks Island are boarded from Hingham.
